steps.title: Use two clear points
steps.content: The line of best fit slopes downward, so the slope must be negative. Two readable points on it are approximately $(0,12)$ and $(10,1)$. Using points on the drawn line, rather than individual scatterplot points, gives the predicted trend's slope.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The slope is negative and closest to $-1.1$, so B is correct. Positive slopes have the wrong sign, and a slope with much larger magnitude is too steep for this line.
